title: Feature Request for repeaters. list of upstream nodes easily enabled on and off

messages.author: Maveric
messages.text: I think there should have a way to mark upstream nodes in a list that indicate their 2 hex values. When you list a upstream repeater it is likely a repeater which is known to cover a wide area like on a mountain top or building. when a flood packet is received from an upstream repeater in the list the repeater will set a lower txpower that is user configurable and repeat the message. This is useful to have a home or neighborhood repeater that is just for getting the lora message into the house but trying to limit its RF impact in a wider area. This also will help with flood routing and dynamic path discovery for dm's as a result as its a way to try to force the "best" paths by setting repeated strength as a "weight"

This is useful to have a home or neighborhood repeater that is just for getting the lora message into the house but trying to limit its RF impact in a wider area. This also will help with flood routing and dynamic path discovery for dm's as a result as its a way to try to force the "best" paths by setting repeated strength as a "weight"
messages.reactions_html: 2
